description: Solon Product SFS runtime for AI-native product work
notes: Solon SFS on Windows requires Git for Windows/Git Bash. If bash.exe is not on PATH, set SFS_BASH to the full bash.exe path.
First-time PowerShell/cmd setup: cd <project>; git init; sfs.cmd init --layout thin --yes; sfs.cmd status. Optional native adapters: sfs.cmd agent install all.
Legacy 0.5.x storage: run `sfs upgrade --opt-in 0.6-storage` to migrate old sprints. Hard cut 2026-11-03.
